sections.paragraph:
& מְכֹנָה f. with suff. מְכֻנָתָהּ Zec 5:11 (o shortened into u, Gramm. § 27, note 1 [ Zec 5:11 is made a separate art. in Thes.]), pl. מְכֹנֹות.

(1) a place, Ezr 3:3 compare Ezr 2:68.

(2) a base, -1 Ki. 7:2736 .

(3) [Mekonah], pr.n. of a town in the tribe of Judah, Neh 11:28.
